title: Streaming Parser with Captures
description: Extract named values from large files without loading them into memory. Combines streaming parser efficiency with capture extraction.

motivation.why: Combine the memory efficiency of streaming with the convenience of named captures. Process GB-scale files while extracting specific fields.
useCases: Log file analysis (extract IPs, status codes from 10GB+ logs)
CSV export processing (extract emails from 500MB+ files)
Real-time feed parsing (stock tickers, event streams)

inputFormat.description: Large files processed in fixed-size chunks.
inputFormat.syntax: Any format with captures: CSV, logs, JSON lines, etc.

outputFormat.description: Captures available after streaming parse completes.
